channelId.title: Slack Channel ID
channelId.description: The Slack Channel ID of the Slack Channel that was archived.
channelId.einstein:description: The Slack Channel ID of the Slack Channel that was archived. The output should be a channel mention string like <#C12345678>. If a string like C123456789 is provided as output, add  the <# and > characters at the start and end of the string respectively. For example, the Slack Channel ID C123456789 is converted to <#C123456789>.
